sourcingNote: Hex colors confirmed from official SVG logo. Values confirmed from Guidelines Report on team website. Pantone confirmed by logo slick.
description: The St. Louis Cardinals are one of the most successful franchises in National League history, founded in 1882 and based in St. Louis, Missouri. They play at Busch Stadium and compete in the NL Central. The Cardinals have won 11 World Series championships, second only to the Yankees, and are known for producing a consistent winning culture and developing homegrown talent.
